articles.title: Why Chainlink is in a position to buck convention this time
articles.description: Chainlink’s price has been on a strong uptrend lately. In fact, in the last 24 hours alone, LINK managed to register a new ATH of $32, with the crypto’s market projecting strong bullish sentiments at press time. However, history would suggest that LINK has had a tendency to endure massive price corrections, right after sustaining […]

articles.title: Grayscale Purchases 53,000 ETH in One Day
articles.description: Grayscale continues to have an appetite for cryptocurrency, according to Glassnode. Since the beginning of 2021, the value of Grayscale’s Ethereum under management has doubled. Glassnode tweeted that the ETH under Grayscale’s management now equals $5.5 billion. Some of this increase, no doubt, is due to the token’s new all-time-high prices. However, Grayscale made a … Continued

articles.title: Top Trader Says He’s Stacking Six Altcoins, Predicts Bitcoin Will Approach $250,000 by July
articles.description: A prominent crypto trader and analyst is looking at three altcoins that he says have the potential to spark major rallies. The pseudonymous trader Kaleo says fellow traders are underestimating Litecoin (LTC). He believes the coin often dubbed as digital silver is poised to follow its 2017 bull rally and generate gains of over 1,000% […]

articles.title: USDtz to enable private stablecoin transactions on Tezos (XTZ)
articles.description: Prelude – zkChannels – a layer 2 scaling solution from Bolt Labs building on Tezos, will enable private transactions for USDtz and the whole StableTez token family.

articles.title: This Hot DeFi Token Is Up 1000% So Far This Year
articles.description: The token of a relatively new decentralized exchange in the decentralized finance (DeFi) space has rallied over 1,000% so far this year as the DEX has been seeing massive trading volumes over the last few weeks. The native token of PancakeSwap (CAKE) launched late last year and has surged recently as the exchange is now […]
